commit.subject: LU-17276 tests: flock scalability test
commit.message:
LU-17276 tests: flock scalability test

Test the performance scalability of increasing numbers of
non-overlapping flock locks.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=1000 testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I63bd42486b1b2e9339ece9d1de6ea0cf2931e9c0
